message:
feat(codegen): Migrate pyvalue_ops.zig to builder pattern

Migrated genPyValueBinOp to use the structured builder pattern:
- Uses builder.write() instead of raw emit() for output
- Uses self.emitZigValue() for ZigValue emission
- Removed helper function (emitPyValueFrom) - inlined into main function
- Removed withParensCtx usage for cleaner code

This continues Phase 4 builder migration by converting Two-Flow
PyValue operations to the unified builder architecture.
